vocab.example: I was utterly captivated by the germination process of the bean seeds I planted in a glass jar for a school project.

vocab.meaning: người thích làm vườn nghiệp dư
vocab.example: Even as a young child, I considered myself a bit of a horticultural hobbyist, tending to the marigolds every evening.

vocab.meaning: tán lá xanh tươi tốt/xum xuê
vocab.example: The fern I grew in the shade of our veranda developed such lush foliage that it became the center of the garden.

vocab.meaning: cây cảnh (cây dùng để trang trí)
vocab.example: My mother gave me a small corner of the yard to cultivate ornamental plants like pansies and petunias.

vocab.meaning: loài cây có khả năng chống chịu tốt
vocab.example: Since I was prone to forgetting to water them, I usually stuck to growing resilient species like cacti.
I clearly remember the day the tulips I had planted months earlier finally burst into color.
My father taught me how to use compost as an organic fertilizer to help my vegetable patch grow stronger.

vocab.meaning: những thứ luôn được yêu thích (hoặc cây lâu năm được ưa chuộng)
vocab.example: Sunflowers were the perennial favorites in our neighborhood because they were so easy for children to grow.
I used to guide the climbing vines of the morning glories up a trellis I made out of bamboo sticks.

vocab.meaning: một khu vườn/nơi trú ẩn thực vật
vocab.example: Growing those small herbs transformed our tiny balcony into a personal botanical sanctuary for me.
